overview.short: Thommankuthu is a waterfall located in Thodupuzha Thaluk, Idukki District, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Thommankuthu is a waterfall located in Thodupuzha Thaluk, Idukki District, Kerala, India. It is one of the major centres of eco-tourism in Kerala. The seven-step waterfall is situated in a forest in the southern part of Western Ghats mountain range. Thommankuthu is a series of 12 falls over a distance of 5 kilometres (3.1 mi).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kannadi
topPlaces.description: Kannadi is a gram panchayat in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. The third Lulu Mall in Kerala, Lulu International Shopping Mall, Palakkad is located in Kannadi.

topPlaces.name: Kattadikkadavu
topPlaces.description: Kattadikkadavu is a hillock and trekking spot located in Vannapuram panchayat near Thodupuzha in Idukki district, Kerala, India. It is also located 34 km from Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam district.

topPlaces.name: Vannappuram
topPlaces.description: Vannappuram is a village in the Idukki district of state Kerala in India . The village is in the highland regions and is loacated 17 km north of Thodupuzha Town and 28 km east of Muvattupuzha Town and lies north of the Kaliyar River.

topPlaces.name: Meenuliyan Para
topPlaces.description: Meenuliyan Para is a prominent mountain peak located near Thodupuzha in the Idukki district of Kerala, India. Characterized by a massive rock formation that rises over 4000 feet, the mountain is named for the fish-scale appearance of its rocky surface.

topPlaces.name: Kaliyar
topPlaces.description: Kaliyar is a small village in the Idukki district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Neyyassery
topPlaces.description: Neyyassery is a village in Karimannoor Panchayat in Thodupuzha Taluk of Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. Neyyassery's registered population was 7,557 per the 2011 census, compared to the population of 7,610 in 2001; the population of the village decreased in that 10 years.

topPlaces.name: Karimannoor
topPlaces.description: Karimannoor is a panchayat of India; earlier it was a Legislative Constitutancy, belonging to Thodupuzha Taluk in Idukki District, Kerala, India. The main occupation of the population is agriculture, predominantly of natural rubber.

topPlaces.name: Chilavu
topPlaces.description: Chilavu is a small village in Thodupuzha Taluk. It lies in the Idukki district of Kerala, South India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thommankuthu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thommankuthu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thommankuthu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thommankuthu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thommankuthu?
faq.a: Stays in Thommankuthu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thommankuthu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kannadi, Kattadikkadavu, Vannappuram, Meenuliyan Para, Kaliyar.
